title: Belvisia ruta-muraria
taxonomy: Belvisia ruta-muraria is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the melastome family. This family consists of approximately 170 genera and 5,000 species of plants. The plant is native to tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. The classification of Belvisia ruta-muraria is further divided into specific ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.

intro: Belvisia ruta-muraria, also known as Belvisia, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Stemonuraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
